# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User wants migrations handled by them and prefers not to add new models; adding properties to existing models is acceptable.
- User roles are stored as integers in the database ( Admin = 0, Editor = 1, Seller = 2, Customer = 3 ).
- Everything frontend related (e.g. image/video uploads ) go inside the frontend folder. Not the project root.
- Stop making markdown documents
